I'm Sorry.
💌
💛
Dear You,

Hey Saranya… I know I messed up, and I'm really sorry.

You didn't deserve that, and I should've handled things better. I've thought about it and I understand where I went wrong.

From here on, I'll drink only water — no alcohol. I'm serious about that change.

I care about you, and I want to do better.

— With all my heart 🌷
